jobs.title: Foundation Excavation & Site Development
jobs.description: We executed a large-scale foundation excavation, utilizing precision leveling to ensure a perfectly flat and stable base for new construction. Our team managed deep-trenching and sub-grade preparation, providing a structurally sound 'blank canvas' for the upcoming build.

jobs.title: Waterfall Stream Reclamation & Erosion Control
jobs.description: We executed a complete restoration of this property's waterway, transforming an overgrown drainage area into a clean, functional stream. Our team cleared significant brush and debris, followed by heavy excavation to reshape the slope. We finalized the job with strategic boulder landscaping to create structural stability for the bridge crossing and armor the waterfall against future erosion.

jobs.title: Driveway Expansion & Shed Pad Installation
jobs.description: We expanded this driveway for additional parking and installed a precision-leveled, raised pad to provide a solid foundation for a new shed.

jobs.title: New Cabin Utility & Driveway Completion
jobs.description: We installed the final electrical and water service lines for a new cabin and completed the driveway. Next, we move into the drainage and septic phases.

jobs.title: Driveway, Drainage & Pavilion Site Prep
jobs.description: We installed a new driveway with integrated ditching and dual culverts, alongside a precision-leveled building pad for a new pavilion overlooking the pond.
